facts.claim: 26 rules cover PBW/VT calc, trilha_manual 10-criterion pathway (C1-C10) w/ two competing alert-aggregation variants, a parallel trilha_automatica v1 pathway (active+dead alert fn), a facade weaning/PEEP-titration protocol, ventilator-param validation across 4 forms, mode/device/modality enums, and free-text classification lists.

THREE independent ventilation pathways exist: trilha_manual C1-C10 (003-014), trilha_automatica v1 (015/016), facade ventilacao_automatica (017); thresholds diverge, e.g. COVID trach >10d (C6) vs >14d (facade).
FiO2 unit handling inconsistent in one model: C2/C3 (004/005) treat fio2 as percent (÷100 for PEEP-table key); C8 (011) treats fio2 as fraction (fio2<0.4).

PEEP/PINS validation bounds diverge by layer: movimentacao+physician forms allow PEEP 0-40/PINS 0-30 cmH2O (018/019); physiotherapist form+backend homecare allow PEEP 5-18/PINS 5-40 cmH2O (020/022/023).
C1 (003) VT flag is absolute >500mL, not weight-indexed, contradicting the correct PBW calculator (001); ARDSNet reference is <=6 mL/kg PBW.
By type: decision-tree=13, validation=6, threshold=5, formula=2. By status: OK=15, DISCREPANCY=9, AMBIGUOUS=2. By verdict: NOT_APPLICABLE=12, DISCREPANCY=8, VERIFIED=5, UNVERIFIABLE=1. Total=26.

load_bearing_rules.what: C1: PINS>16 OR VC>500mL absolute; alert-forcing
C9: shock w/o VM (lactate>2.5+pressors+no VM); alert-forcing
C10: oxygenation incl. COPD SpO2 target
trilha_manual alert: VERMELHO if >=3 crit or C1/C8/C9
Device/modality enums; C4 uppercase PCV/VCV vs lowercase field -> unreachable branch

systemic_issues.detail: Legacy calcular_alerta unused by save(); AMBIGUOUS intent
C2 peep>0 check dead inside 'False and ...'
Absolute VT; trach 10d vs 14d; lactate >2.5 vs Sepsis-3 >2
Free-text lists preserve misspellings/misroutes, exact-match only
vm_invasiva value paired with nasal-cannula label BE+FE

open_questions: COVID trach timing: code >10d or facade >14d?
Which alert-aggregation convention (count(True) vs count(1)) is intended?
Which PEEP/PINS range (0-40/0-30 vs 5-18/5-40) is correct for v2?
